description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a camouflage paint scheme and distinctive shark mouth nose art. The fuselage is streamlined, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit featuring a clear canopy and visible framing. The wings are low-mounted and straight, each bearing roundel insignia, and the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is in a taildragger configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, painted with a red spinner, and the engine cowling is detailed with exhaust ports. The overall appearance suggests a World War II-era fighter aircraft, with functional details such as antenna wires and realistic surface paneling.
description: A camouflaged, single-propeller military airplane with shark mouth nose art, low-mounted straight wings, and a taildragger landing gear. Features include a forward enclosed cockpit, roundel insignia, and detailed surface paneling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the shark mouth nose art, propeller, cockpit canopy, and roundel insignia on the wing and fuselage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the two main landing gear under the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the propeller, cockpit, and roundel insignia, with clear visibility of the tail wheel and exhaust ports.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the propeller, red spinner, forward canopy, and the symmetrical layout of the wings and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear framed canopy.
